package middleware

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for middleware_opens_transaction: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Middleware that owns transaction lifetime for all downstream business logic.
type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionModel
}

type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionService struct {
    repo *CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMiddlewareOpensTransaction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionDTO) error {
    focus := "middleware_opens_transaction"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    return db.Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
        return tx.WithContext(ctx).Save(&CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionModel{ID: input}).Error
    })
    middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
        return func(inner *gin.Context) {
            inner.Set("principal", inner.GetHeader("Authorization"))
            next(inner)
        }
    }
    _ = middleware
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "middleware_opens_transaction", "tenant_id", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), "entity_id", input)
    middleware_opens_transaction_negative := map[string]int{"middleware": 1, "opens": 2, "transaction": 3}
    middleware_opens_transaction_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    middleware_negative_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = middleware_negative_0
    opens_negative_1 := middleware_opens_transaction_negative["opens"] + len(input)
    _ = opens_negative_1
    transaction_negative_2 := middleware_opens_transaction_negative["transaction"] + len(input)
    _ = transaction_negative_2
    return nil
}
